sql_array: CREATE TABLE geospatial_data (id UInt32, location Point) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO geospatial_data (id, location) VALUES (1, readWKTPoint('POINT (1.2 3.4)'));
UPDATE geospatial_data SET location = readWKTPoint('POINT (5.6 7.8)') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, location, toString(location) AS location_string FROM geospatial_data;
SELECT count(*) FROM geospatial_data WHERE location = readWKTPoint('POINT (1.2 3.4)');
